bio.heroSubtitle: Building Generative AI solutions that bridge the digital divide. Specialized in RAG, Low-Resource NLP, and Enterprise Analytics.
aboutText: In the realm where data meets architecture, I build solutions that prioritize real-world impact over complex novelty. Currently focused on creating robust backend systems and Gen AI accessible on low-resource hardware.
A 9.1 CGPA Data Science student whose foundation lies in relentless problem solving—with over 1200 challenges conquered across competitive logic platforms.

Whether it is dropping agricultural advisory latency to 3 seconds for Indian farmers or accelerating semantic retrieval for enterprise clients, my engineering philosophy remains the same: High Precision, Low Overhead.
